title: Amtech I0100 Socket Set, Mechanics Tool Kit, 40-Piece Chrome Plated Carbon Steel, Assortment of 1/4" and 3/8", Storage Case
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This 40 piece socket set is made from strong, chrome plated hardened steel for durability
CONTENTS: It includes a useful assortment of 1/4" and 3/8" sockets
CARRY CASE: It is supplied in a sturdy, blow moulded storage case
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description The Amtech ratchet socket set is an ideal addition to your mechanical tool kit. Comprising of 40 pieces that are manufactured from strong chrome plated hardened steel for all round performance and durability. Includes handy blow moulded storage organiser for ease of use. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
